arts.ttl: Real Madrid ‘fear’ key player will be suspended for Arsenal clash
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid are sweating over the availability of a key member of the club’s backline for their upcoming Champions League showdown with Arsenal. That’s according to Marca,…
Die Adler could be adding more talent to their ranks with a transfer target drawing comparisons to the great Luka Modric.

arts.ttl: Who Should Arsenal Replace Gabriel With for Real Madrid?
arts.sum: Gabriel is out for the remainder of the season with a hamstring injury leaving Mikel Arteta with a major decision to make in defense for Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid goalkeeping concern: 19-year-old could make debut three days before Arsenal
arts.sum: Real Madrid could be down to their third-choice goalkeeper this week, with doubts over Andriy Lunin and Thibaut Courtois.
